needs_user_confirmation: Confirm whether to start the 48 hour demo.
should_not_do: Do not build a desktop app before the agent quality loop is validated.

credible_success_path.credible_demand_evidence: The cited sessions and spec both point to repeated local project selection work.
credible_success_path.current_alternative: Manual notes, scattered agent session search, and ad hoc project docs.
credible_success_path.first_distribution_path: Share a local-first CLI demo with solo builders who already use coding agents.
credible_success_path.kill_signal: Users do not accept any generated card after reviewing the evidence chain.
credible_success_path.narrow_user: Solo builders using local coding agents for projects and research.
credible_success_path.two_week_validation_signal: Three builders accept one generated card and start a 48 hour demo.

demo_48h: Scan local agent sessions and project docs.
Accept or reject the top project card.

demo_brief.boundary_48h: No desktop app, watcher, sync, or team workflow.
demo_brief.core_interaction: Review one card, inspect cited evidence, then accept, snooze, or reject.
demo_brief.demo_kill_signal: The top card feels generic or unsupported by evidence.
demo_brief.demo_success_signal: The user accepts one card and starts a concrete demo.
demo_brief.one_screen_product_shape: A weekly report with a top demo, cards, and evidence citations.

prototype_panel.core_interaction_state: A selected card shows evidence ids and a 48 hour plan.
prototype_panel.empty_state: No repeated opportunity has enough evidence yet.
prototype_panel.one_screen_mock: Left rail with evidence, right panel with project card and decision buttons.
prototype_panel.success_state: One card is accepted and marked as this week's demo.

demo_brief.prototype_prompt: Build one screen for reviewing Tradar cards.

evidence_notes: The Codex session evidence shows repeated project radar requests.
The MVP spec requires evidence-backed opportunity cards.
opportunity_cards.first_users: Solo builders who already rely on local coding agents.
kill_signals: No accepted card after one real weekly report.
opportunity_cards.one_sentence: Turn local coding-agent work traces into evidence-backed project opportunity cards.
risks: The report could collapse into generic startup ideas if evidence citation is weak.
opportunity_cards.title: Tradar for Solo Builders
why_now: The core local evidence pipeline already exists.
why_you: The user already preserves agent sessions, project docs, and planning notes.

run_summary.confidence_note: The opportunity is based on repeated local agent work and the MVP spec.

this_weeks_demo.summary: Run one local evidence-backed report and decide whether to start a 48 hour demo.
this_weeks_demo.title: Tradar for Solo Builders
